ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_items" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media item */,
  "objectid" TEXT /* Unique object ID for the media item */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the media item */,
  "youtubeid" TEXT /* YouTube ID for video media items */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the media item */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the creator of the media item */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the media item was created or captured */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media item */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject of the media item */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the media item */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the media item's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the media item's location */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the media item */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the media item */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the media item */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the format of the media item */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the media item */,
  "rights_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rights information for the media item */,
  "rightsstatement" TEXT /* URL to the rights statement */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the media item */,
  "categories" TEXT /* Categories associated with the media item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the media item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the media item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_items_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES media_languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_items_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES media_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_items_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_items_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_items_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES media_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_items_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "creator_name" TEXT /* Name of the creator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the creator */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the creator */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the creator */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media profiles of the creator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "parent_subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the curator of the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_collections" (
  "media_collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media collection association */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media item */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the media item was added to the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_collections_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_items ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_collections_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rights" (
  "rights_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rights type */,
  "rights_name" TEXT /* Name of the rights type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rights type */,
  "license_url" TEXT /* URL to the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rights_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_rights" (
  "media_rights_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media rights association */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media item */,
  "rights_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rights type */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rights were granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_rights_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_rights_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_items ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_rights_rights_id FOREIGN KEY ("rights_id") REFERENCES rights ("rights_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media item being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the media item */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the media item was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_items ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media item */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_versions_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_items ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the media format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media format */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the media format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the media type (e.g., Image, Video) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the media type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media item the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the media file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_files_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_items ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_tags" (
  "media_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media tag association */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media item */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was added to the media item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_tags_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_items ("media_id")
)
